executable.title: Region of Interest Report
executable.description: Summarize each nonzero region in a label map as a downloadable CSV containing its name, label value, voxel count, and physical volume.

image.name: inputLabelmap
image.label: Input Label Map
image.description: A scalar integer label map. Zero is background and each nonzero value is one region of interest.

file.name: outputReport
file.label: Region of Interest Report
file.description: CSV report containing one row per nonzero label value.

parameters.label: Girder API
parameters.description: Server access injected by slicer_cli_web; not shown to users.
